what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
text: data/*.rda — Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R — Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegAtlastrack-package.R — Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda — Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ — Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegAtlastrack
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggsegverse GitHub org

what: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: AtlasTrack probabilistic white matter fiber tract atlas ggseg ecosystem.

title: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install package GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(   ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",   CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org" ))  install.packages("ggsegAtlasTrack") # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegAtlasTrack")

title: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: library(ggseg) library(ggsegAtlastrack) library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_brain(     atlas = atlastrack(),     mapping = aes(fill = label),     show.legend = FALSE   ) +   theme_void()

title: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas — atlastrack
code: atlastrack() #>  #> ── atlastrack ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: subcortical #> Regions: 35 #> Hemispheres: right, left, NA #> Views: axial_1, axial_2, axial_3, axial_4, axial_5, axial_6, axial_7, #> coronal_1, coronal_2, coronal_3, coronal_4, coronal_5, sagittal #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (meshes) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 35 × 3 #>    hemi  region  label   #>    <chr> <chr>   <chr>   #>  1 right r fx    R_Fx    #>  2 left  l fx    L_Fx    #>  3 right r cgc   R_CgC   #>  4 left  l cgc   L_CgC   #>  5 right r cgh   R_CgH   #>  6 left  l cgh   L_CgH   #>  7 right r cst   R_CST   #>  8 left  l cst   L_CST   #>  9 right r atr   R_ATR   #> 10 left  l atr   L_ATR   #> 11 right r unc   R_Unc   #> 12 left  l unc   L_Unc   #> 13 right r ilf   R_ILF   #> 14 left  l ilf   L_ILF   #> 15 right r ifo   R_IFO   #> 16 left  l ifo   L_IFO   #> 17 NA    fmaj    Fmaj    #> 18 NA    fmin    Fmin    #> 19 NA    cc      CC      #> 20 right r slf   R_SLF   #> 21 left  l slf   L_SLF   #> 22 right r tslf  R_tSLF  #> 23 left  l tslf  L_tSLF  #> 24 right r pslf  R_pSLF  #> 25 left  l pslf  L_pSLF  #> 26 right r scs   R_SCS   #> 27 left  l scs   L_SCS   #> 28 right r fscs  R_fSCS  #> 29 left  l fscs  L_fSCS  #> 30 right r pscs  R_pSCS  #> 31 left  l pscs  L_pSCS  #> 32 right r sifc  R_SIFC  #> 33 left  l sifc  L_SIFC  #> 34 right r ifsfc R_IFSFC #> 35 left  l ifsfc L_IFSFC if (FALSE) plot(atlastrack()) # \dontrun{}

what: ggsegAtlastrack: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegAtlastrack-package
title: ggsegAtlastrack: AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegAtlastrack-package
text: AtlasTrack probabilistic white matter fiber tract atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides 'ggseg_atlas' objects DTI fiber tract visualization, commonly used ABCD study data.
